TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pangcah_lilengawan, title = Pangcah_lilengawan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pangcah_lilengawan} }

S.FORM: == Pangcah lilengawan == O sakapitilid tonini a kimad i, mangalay kami a mipatalahekal to licay no mita o Pangcah to nika nanicowaay kita hakiya ! Masamaan ko 'orip no tato'asan no mita hakiya! ta anini sato i, mafana' to kita to so'elinay a Kawas, yasanay a licay no faloco' ko sakapitilid niyam. Tona mafana' kita to Kawas anini, saka o mamafana' kita to nafaloco'an no Kawas a palacidek to laleko(faco) nira, saka mangalay ko Kawas to sapikapotaw to kasafinacadan itini i polong nonini a hekal. Hadidi han nira ko fokil no tamdamdaw i cingraan tangasa i piocoran to dengan a wawa nira ci Yis Keristo. O satapang no 'orip no mita o tamdaw i, malecaday to ma'emin a kasini'adaan. Onini ko sapipatado no Kawas a paca'edong ci Ataman aci Ifaan itiya ho. Talacowa matiya o no a'adopen ko 'orip ita itiya ho, nikaorira, o no Kawas a nipafaloco'an a pakacitaneng i titaanan o tamdaw, saka mafalic a mafalic a macakat ko 'orip ita itini i kasarekarekad no mihecaan. Ano caay pafaloco'en no Kawas kita o tamdaw i, matiyaay o a'adopen kita a caay ka fana' to sakafalicaw no 'orip. Ano mafokifokil ko tato'asan ita to so'elinay a Kawas hananay i, ira a mararid ko Kawas a midipot I titanan to ha:tiniay. Mikansiya kako I Kawas to nika ano mafokifokil kita o Pangcah to nika o so'elinay a Kaws cingra, saka caay tekopen no Kawas ko tato'asan ita a matiya o Sotom ato Komola. Papitalaen nira cangra tangasa I picomodan no nga'ayay a ratoh. Okakansiyaen ita ko Kawas to pisanga' nira to tiring ita ato nika matini no pikerid nira titaanan tahanini. Nanay o sakapalal no faloco' ita a mafana' a pahemek I cingraan ko piasip ita tonini a cudad. Ano mafana' to kita tonini i, o papasifana'en ita ko Kawas ita tonini to sakafohat no faloco' nangra a mafana' to nano to'as no 'orip tahanini. Masamaan ko pikilim no Kawas titaanan a mifohat to faloco' ita? O patosokan niyam konini a misanga' tonini a cudad. O roma sato, kita o mafana'ay to Kawas i, itini i piasip tonini a cudad a mahapinang ita ko matiniay, o pidokdok ni Satang a micomod to Itin a pala ko pidokdok no palafoay a sapi'afasan to faloco' ita to sakiso'elinay a Kawas. Orasaka malalood i faloco' ita nani tiya a tahanini ko sifana' no Kawas ato pisiwala no palafoay to harateng ita. Saka tayra sato cangra a tatosa a malikaka. Itira sato i ra:ay to caay ka tangasa no tamdaw cangra a mifuting. Itiya to i, satatosa sato cangra a malikaka. Itiya i, fahal sato ko pileno no riyar ato ira haca ko tata'angay a tapelik i, ma'alol a mataroh a talasifo' no riyar. Tona awaay ko nitatoyan a sa'iwas. Caay ka filo nangra.Nawhani, tata'ang to ko fali a micekeroh a mi'alol i cangraan. Saka, pawpaw sato cangra a ma'alol. Itiya i, malonen, mafaliyos ko kitakit ato riyar a maemin.
S.PHON: == paŇč ¶ańß …ĺi…ĺ…ôŇčawan == o~u sakapiti…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~unini a kima…¨~…ģ i, maŇča…ĺaj kami a mipata…ĺańß…ôka…ĺ to~u …ĺi ¶aj no~u mita o~u paŇč ¶ańß to~u nika nani ¶o~uwaaj kita ńßakija ! masamaan ko~u °o~urip no~u tato~u °asan no~u mita ńßakija! ta anini sato~u i, mafana ° to~u kita to~u so~u °…ô…ĺinaj a kawas, jasanaj a …ĺi ¶aj no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ko~u sakapiti…ĺi…¨~…ģ nijam. to~una mafana ° kita to~u kawas anini, saka o~u mamafana ° kita to~u nafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °an no~u kawas a pa…ĺa ¶i…¨~…ģ…ôk to~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôko~u(fa ¶o~u) nira, saka maŇča…ĺaj ko~u kawas to~u sapikapo~utaw to~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan itini i po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~unini a ńß…ôka…ĺ. ńßa…¨~…ģi…¨~…ģi ńßan nira ko~u fo~uki…ĺ no~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw i ¶iŇčraan taŇčasa i pio~u ¶o~uran to~u …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan a wawa nira ¶i jis k…ôristo~u. o~u satapaŇč no~u °o~urip no~u mita o~u tam…¨~…ģaw i, ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģaj to~u ma °…ômin a kasini °a…¨~…ģaan. o~unini ko~u sapipata…¨~…ģo~u no~u kawas a pa ¶a °…ô…¨~…ģo~uŇč ¶i ataman a ¶i ifaan itija ńßo~u. ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa matija o~u no~u a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn ko~u °o~urip ita itija ńßo~u, nikao~urira, o~u no~u kawas a nipafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °an a paka ¶itan…ôŇč i titaanan o~u tam…¨~…ģaw, saka mafa…ĺi ¶ a mafa…ĺi ¶ a ma ¶akat ko~u °o~urip ita itini i kasar…ôkar…ôka…¨~…ģ no~u mińß…ô ¶aan. ano~u ¶aaj pafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °…ôn no~u kawas kita o~u tam…¨~…ģaw i, matijaaj o~u a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn kita a ¶aaj ka fana ° to~u sakafa…ĺi ¶aw no~u °o~urip. ano~u mafo~ukifo~uki…ĺ ko~u tato~u °asan ita to~u so~u °…ô…ĺinaj a kawas ńßananaj i, ira a marari…¨~…ģ ko~u kawas a mi…¨~…ģipo~ut i titanan to~u ńßa:tiniaj. mikansija kako~u i kawas to~u nika ano~u mafo~ukifo~uki…ĺ kita o~u paŇč ¶ańß to~u nika o~u so~u °…ô…ĺinaj a kaws ¶iŇčra, saka ¶aaj t…ôko~up…ôn no~u kawas ko~u tato~u °asan ita a matija o~u so~uto~um ato~u ko~umo~u…ĺa. papita…ĺa…ôn nira ¶aŇčra taŇčasa i pi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģan no~u Ňča °ajaj a rato~uńß. o~ukakansija…ôn ita ko~u kawas to~u pisaŇča ° nira to~u tiriŇč ita ato~u nika matini no~u pik…ôri…¨~…ģ nira titaanan tańßanini. nanaj o~u sakapa…ĺa…ĺ no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ita a mafana ° a pańß…ôm…ôk i ¶iŇčraan ko~u piasip ita to~unini a ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ. ano~u mafana ° to~u kita to~unini i, o~u papasifana °…ôn ita ko~u kawas ita to~unini to~u sakafo~uńßat no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° naŇčra a mafana ° to~u nano~u to~u °as no~u °o~urip tańßanini. masamaan ko~u piki…ĺim no~u kawas titaanan a mifo~uńßat to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ita? o~u pato~uso~ukan nijam ko~unini a misaŇča ° to~unini a ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ. o~u ro~uma sato~u, kita o~u mafana °aj to~u kawas i, itini i piasip to~unini a ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ a mańßapinaŇč ita ko~u matiniaj, o~u pi…¨~…ģo~uk…¨~…ģo~uk ni sataŇč a mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~u itin a pa…ĺa ko~u pi…¨~…ģo~uk…¨~…ģo~uk no~u pa…ĺafo~uaj a sapi °afasan to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ita to~u sakiso~u °…ô…ĺinaj a kawas. o~urasaka ma…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ita nani tija a tańßanini ko~u sifana ° no~u kawas ato~u pisiwa…ĺa no~u pa…ĺafo~uaj to~u ńßarat…ôŇč ita. saka tajra sato~u ¶aŇčra a tato~usa a ma…ĺikaka. itira sato~u i ra:aj to~u ¶aaj ka taŇčasa no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ¶aŇčra a mifo~u~utiŇč. itija to~u i, satato~usa sato~u ¶aŇčra a ma…ĺikaka. itija i, fańßa…ĺ sato~u ko~u pi…ĺ…ôno~u no~u rijar ato~u ira ńßa ¶a ko~u tata °aŇčaj a tap…ô…ĺik i, ma °a…ĺo~u…ĺ a mataro~uńß a ta…ĺasifo~u ° no~u rijar. to~una awaaj ko~u nitato~ujan a sa °iwas. ¶aaj ka fi…ĺo~u naŇčra.nawńßani, tata °aŇč to~u ko~u fa…ĺi a mi ¶…ôk…ôro~uńß a mi °a…ĺo~u…ĺ i ¶aŇčraan. saka, pawpaw sato~u ¶aŇčra a ma °a…ĺo~u…ĺ. itija i, ma…ĺo~un…ôn, mafa…ĺijo~us ko~u kitakit ato~u rijar a ma…ômin.
S.FORM: == Pangcah lilengawan == O sakapitilid tonini a kimad i, mangalay kami a mipatalahekal to licay no mita o Pangcah to nika nanicowaay kita hakiya ! Masamaan ko 'orip no tato'asan no mita hakiya! ta anini sato i, mafana' to kita to so'elinay a Kawas, yasanay a licay no faloco' ko sakapitilid niyam. Tona mafana' kita to Kawas anini, saka o mamafana' kita to nafaloco'an no Kawas a palacidek to laleko(faco) nira, saka mangalay ko Kawas to sapikapotaw to kasafinacadan itini i polong nonini a hekal. Hadidi han nira ko fokil no tamdamdaw i cingraan tangasa i piocoran to dengan a wawa nira ci Yis Keristo. O satapang no 'orip no mita o tamdaw i, malecaday to ma'emin a kasini'adaan. Onini ko sapipatado no Kawas a paca'edong ci Ataman aci Ifaan itiya ho. Talacowa matiya o no a'adopen ko 'orip ita itiya ho, nikaorira, o no Kawas a nipafaloco'an a pakacitaneng i titaanan o tamdaw, saka mafalic a mafalic a macakat ko 'orip ita itini i kasarekarekad no mihecaan. Ano caay pafaloco'en no Kawas kita o tamdaw i, matiyaay o a'adopen kita a caay ka fana' to sakafalicaw no 'orip. Ano mafokifokil ko tato'asan ita to so'elinay a Kawas hananay i, ira a mararid ko Kawas a midipot I titanan to ha:tiniay. Mikansiya kako I Kawas to nika ano mafokifokil kita o Pangcah to nika o so'elinay a Kaws cingra, saka caay tekopen no Kawas ko tato'asan ita a matiya o Sotom ato Komola. Papitalaen nira cangra tangasa I picomodan no nga'ayay a ratoh. Okakansiyaen ita ko Kawas to pisanga' nira to tiring ita ato nika matini no pikerid nira titaanan tahanini. Nanay o sakapalal no faloco' ita a mafana' a pahemek I cingraan ko piasip ita tonini a cudad. Ano mafana' to kita tonini i, o papasifana'en ita ko Kawas ita tonini to sakafohat no faloco' nangra a mafana' to nano to'as no 'orip tahanini. Masamaan ko pikilim no Kawas titaanan a mifohat to faloco' ita? O patosokan niyam konini a misanga' tonini a cudad. O roma sato, kita o mafana'ay to Kawas i, itini i piasip tonini a cudad a mahapinang ita ko matiniay, o pidokdok ni Satang a micomod to Itin a pala ko pidokdok no palafoay a sapi'afasan to faloco' ita to sakiso'elinay a Kawas. Orasaka malalood i faloco' ita nani tiya a tahanini ko sifana' no Kawas ato pisiwala no palafoay to harateng ita. Saka tayra sato cangra a tatosa a malikaka. Itira sato i ra:ay to caay ka tangasa no tamdaw cangra a mifuting. Itiya to i, satatosa sato cangra a malikaka. Itiya i, fahal sato ko pileno no riyar ato ira haca ko tata'angay a tapelik i, ma'alol a mataroh a talasifo' no riyar. Tona awaay ko nitatoyan a sa'iwas. Caay ka filo nangra.Nawhani, tata'ang to ko fali a micekeroh a mi'alol i cangraan. Saka, pawpaw sato cangra a ma'alol. Itiya i, malonen, mafaliyos ko kitakit ato riyar a maemin.

k…ôristo~u. o~u satapaŇč no~u °o~urip no~u mita o~u tam…¨~…ģaw i, ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģaj to~u ma °…ômin a kasini °a…¨~…ģaan. o~unini ko~u sapipata…¨~…ģo~u no~u kawas a pa ¶a °…ô…¨~…ģo~uŇč ¶i ataman a ¶i ifaan itija ńßo~u. ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa matija o~u no~u a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn ko~u °o~urip ita itija ńßo~u, nikao~urira, o~u no~u kawas a nipafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °an a paka ¶itan…ôŇč i titaanan o~u tam…¨~…ģaw, saka mafa…ĺi ¶ a mafa…ĺi ¶ a ma ¶akat ko~u °o~urip ita itini i kasar…ôkar…ôka…¨~…ģ no~u mińß…ô ¶aan. ano~u ¶aaj pafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °…ôn no~u kawas kita o~u tam…¨~…ģaw i, matijaaj o~u a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn kita a ¶aaj ka fana ° to~u sakafa…ĺi ¶aw no~u °o~urip. ano~u mafo~ukifo~uki…ĺ ko~u tato~u °asan ita to~u so~u °…ô…ĺinaj a kawas ńßananaj i, ira a marari…¨~…ģ ko~u kawas a mi…¨~…ģipo~ut i titanan to~u ńßa:tiniaj. mikansija kako~u i kawas to~u nika ano~u mafo~ukifo~uki…ĺ kita o~u paŇč ¶ańß to~u nika o~u so~u °…ô…ĺinaj a kaws ¶iŇčra, saka ¶aaj t…ôko~up…ôn no~u kawas ko~u tato~u °asan ita a matija o~u so~uto~um ato~u ko~umo~u…ĺa. papita…ĺa…ôn nira ¶aŇčra taŇčasa i pi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģan no~u Ňča °ajaj a rato~uńß. o~ukakansija…ôn ita ko~u kawas to~u pisaŇča ° nira to~u tiriŇč ita ato~u nika matini no~u pik…ôri…¨~…ģ nira titaanan tańßanini. nanaj o~u sakapa…ĺa…ĺ no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ita a mafana ° a pańß…ôm…ôk i ¶iŇčraan ko~u piasip ita to~unini a ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ. ano~u mafana ° to~u kita to~unini i, o~u papasifana °…ôn ita ko~u kawas ita to~unini to~u sakafo~uńßat no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° naŇčra a mafana ° to~u nano~u to~u °as no~u °o~urip tańßanini. masamaan ko~u piki…ĺim no~u kawas titaanan a mifo~uńßat to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ita? o~u pato~uso~ukan nijam ko~unini a misaŇča ° to~unini a ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ. o~u ro~uma sato~u, kita o~u mafana °aj to~u kawas i, itini i piasip to~unini a ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ a mańßapinaŇč ita ko~u matiniaj, o~u pi…¨~…ģo~uk…¨~…ģo~uk ni sataŇč a mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~u itin a pa…ĺa ko~u pi…¨~…ģo~uk…¨~…ģo~uk no~u pa…ĺafo~uaj a sapi °afasan to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ita to~u sakiso~u °…ô…ĺinaj a kawas. o~urasaka ma…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ita nani tija a tańßanini ko~u sifana ° no~u kawas ato~u pisiwa…ĺa no~u pa…ĺafo~uaj to~u ńßarat…ôŇč ita. saka tajra sato~u ¶aŇčra a tato~usa a ma…ĺikaka. itira sato~u i ra:aj to~u ¶aaj ka taŇčasa no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ¶aŇčra a mifo~u~utiŇč. itija to~u i, satato~usa sato~u ¶aŇčra a ma…ĺikaka. itija i, fańßa…ĺ sato~u ko~u pi…ĺ…ôno~u no~u rijar ato~u ira ńßa ¶a ko~u tata °aŇčaj a tap…ô…ĺik i, ma °a…ĺo~u…ĺ a mataro~uńß a ta…ĺasifo~u ° no~u rijar. to~una awaaj ko~u nitato~ujan a sa °iwas. ¶aaj ka fi…ĺo~u naŇčra.nawńßani, tata °aŇč to~u ko~u fa…ĺi a mi ¶…ôk…ôro~uńß a mi °a…ĺo~u…ĺ i ¶aŇčraan. saka, pawpaw sato~u ¶aŇčra a ma °a…ĺo~u…ĺ. itija i, ma…ĺo~un…ôn, mafa…ĺijo~us ko~u kitakit ato~u rijar a ma…ômin.
